info.description: Personal environmental telemetry and carbon intelligence platform.
info.title: Atmos API

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of activities for the authenticated user.
Returns all activities when from/to are omitted.

post.description:
Records a transport or flight activity and triggers async emission calculation.
activity_type is derived automatically from transport_mode — do not send it.

get.description:
Returns all activities for the authenticated user as a downloadable CSV file.
Optional from/to query params filter by date_local (YYYY-MM-DD). Capped at 5000 rows.

Returns a single activity by ID (must belong to the authenticated user),
including a server-computed impact context (trees/LED-hours/global-%
comparisons and a greener-alternative suggestion where one exists).

delete.description: Permanently removes an activity and recalculates the affected day's

patch.description: Partially updates an activity. Only transport_mode, distance_km,

post.description: Sends a reset link to the given email if an account exists.

get.description: Handles the OAuth callback, exchanges the code, and returns a JWT pair
Redirects the client to Google's OAuth consent screen

post.description: Verifies a Google ID token from the native mobile SDK and returns a JWT pair
Rotate refresh token and issue a new token pair
Create a new account with email and password
Sends a fresh verification link to the authenticated user's email.
Validates the token from the reset email and sets a new password.
Confirms ownership of the email address using the token from the

get.description: Returns all active devices registered by the authenticated user

post.description:
Registers a new device or updates an existing one (upsert by device_token).
iOS/iPadOS require push_provider=apns and apns_environment.
Android requires push_provider=fcm or none.

delete.description: Marks a device as inactive (soft deactivation)

patch.description: Updates the push token (and optionally app version) for a device

get.description: Returns the Google consent-page URL as JSON so mobile clients

parameters.description: Target platform: mobile (deep-link callback) or omit for web
parameters.name: platform

get.description: Exchanges the auth code for tokens and stores them.
Redirects the authenticated user to Google's consent page.

delete.description: Removes the stored Gmail OAuth tokens for the authenticated user.

post.description: Fetches emails that failed regex parsing (status=unrecognised) and

get.description: Returns a paginated list of emails we have processed (or attempted).

post.description: Clears the stored Gmail historyId so the next sync re-scans all

get.description: Returns whether the user has connected their Gmail account.

post.description: Fetches recent ride-receipt emails, parses them, and ingests activities.

get.description: Returns server and dependency status

Returns a paginated list of insights for the authenticated user,
filtered to insights whose period overlaps the requested window.
Returns a single insight by ID

patch.description: Marks the given insight as read for the authenticated user

post.description: Internal endpoint called by the worker cron to enrich emails
post.summary: Re-parse unrecognised emails for all users via LLM

post.description: Internal endpoint called by the Linux cron job to sync Gmail for every
post.summary: Trigger Gmail sync for all users

get.description:
Returns up to 5 place suggestions matching the query string.
Backed by the Google Maps Places Text Search API; degrades to an
empty list when no Maps API key is configured.

Returns the route distance in km between two coordinates for a given
travel mode. Backed by the Google Maps Distance Matrix API.

parameters.description: One of driving, walking, bicycling, transit
parameters.name: mode

get.description: Returns providers that have at least one active email type.
Returns every provider including inactive ("coming soon") ones.

Returns the emission and distance summary for a given day, with trend vs. the previous day.
Defaults to today when the date query param is omitted. Returns zeros (not 404) for days with no recorded activities.

parameters.description: Date in YYYY-MM-DD format (default: today in UTC)
parameters.name: date

get.description:
Returns the emission and distance summary for a given month, with trend vs. the previous month.
Defaults to the current month when year/month are omitted.

Returns the emission and distance summary for a given week (Mon–Sun), with trend vs. the previous week.
week_start must be a Monday. Defaults to the current week's Monday when omitted.

parameters.description: Week start date in YYYY-MM-DD format (Monday)
parameters.name: week_start

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile

put.description: Updates display name, timezone, locale, or avatar URL

get.description: Returns all active API keys for the authenticated user. Raw keys are never returned.

post.description:
Generates a new API key for the authenticated user. The raw key is returned
once in this response and cannot be retrieved again. Store it securely.

delete.description: Permanently revokes an API key. This cannot be undone.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's preferences, creating defaults if none exist

put.description: Partially updates preferences — only provided fields are changed

display_origin.description:
DisplayOrigin/DisplayDestination are short, human-friendly addresses
(e.g. "Kaggadasapura, Bengaluru") resolved from coordinates via Google
Places. Clients should prefer these over Origin/Destination and fall
back when nil (no coords, resolver unavailable, or not yet resolved).

kg_co2e.description:
KgCO2e is populated via a LEFT JOIN with the emissions table on read.
It is not a column on activities and must never be written by GORM.

origin.description: Dedup fields — populated by GPS tracking and/or receipt ingestion.

x-enum-comments.SourceGPSReceipt: GPS trip enriched with a matched receipt

x-enum-descriptions: GPS trip enriched with a matched receipt

sender_code.description: FK → provider_email_types.code; NULL for pre-route skips

display_origin.description:
DisplayOrigin/DisplayDestination are short, human-friendly addresses
(e.g. "Kaggadasapura, Bengaluru") resolved from coordinates via Google
Places. Clients should prefer these over Origin/Destination and fall
back when nil (no coords, resolver unavailable, or not yet resolved).

kg_co2e.description:
KgCO2e is populated via a LEFT JOIN with the emissions table on read.
It is not a column on activities and must never be written by GORM.

origin.description: Dedup fields — populated by GPS tracking and/or receipt ingestion.

alternative_mode.description:
AlternativeMode is the greenest readily-available substitute transport
mode, omitted when the activity's mode is already zero-emission or no
alternative is actually greener for this trip's distance.

idempotency_key.description: IdempotencyKey is optional. When omitted the server derives one from stable fields.

origin_lat.description: Dedup fields — GPS coordinates for trip origin/destination.
